variables.notes: CR:c|high|misclassified. No explicit single SG&A subtotal row exists. Chose overhead buckets above operating profit and excluded subcomponents that would double count ('Other Administrative expenses' within 'Administrative expenses') as well as depreciation/amortization rows, acquisition transaction costs, and totals/balancing items. No separate operating R&D expense line appears above EBIT, so none added here.

variables.notes: No dedicated research and development expense line is visible on the income statement. The only R&D-related item is supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D, which should not be treated as current-period R&D expense for XRD.
